_doc: Routes with an expected non-healthy API smoke status in the currently deployed QA API. Smoke fails when this list drifts in EITHER direction — a new bug joins, OR an existing bug gets fixed/deployed (so we know to remove the entry). File a Linear ticket when adding long-lived handler bugs; remove pending-deploy entries after the route is live. Use expectRouteMiss for pending Terraform routes that are not deployed yet.

broken.note: Webhook signature validation throws when no body/headers; needs explicit 400 path for unsigned probes.
